title: Harmonia
description: Add compatability between Cadmus and Xaero's Worldmap. (Fabric/Forge 1.20.1)
body:
_Named after the wife of the great king and founder of Thebes._

This mod works alongside [Cadmus](https://modrinth.com/mod/cadmus) (>=1.0.7) and [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) (>= 1.38.1) for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Fabric and Forge). 

It aims to provide the Cadmus claiming functionalities within the Xaero's World Map. It needs to be installed on both, the client and server, for it to work. Clients without the mod can still connect to the server without problem.

If you come across issues, create a ticket on the GitHub project.
